title: Raw UI Lab Result Diagnosis

decision.next_phase: Phase 27.106 — Social Subfamily + Topic Variant Objective Design
decision.why: Live raw UI probes prove the visible replies are generated by SF-10M Phase 27.81, but the model still collapses greeting/smalltalk/open_social into one social family, misses unknown/bare topics, and needs objective/curriculum repair before any scaling or official runtime release.

live_probe_summary.speed_explanation: SF-10M is small and already loaded locally, so generation is fast; speed does not imply templates.
healthy_lanes: planning prompts such as نظم وقتي
support prompts such as أنا متوتر / كيف أهدأ
known topic prompts when phrased as عرف/وش يعني/ما معنى
weak_lanes: greeting: السلام عليكم returns generic open_social instead of direct greeting
bare unknown topic: الاخوه is not covered and collapses to general
capability/identity style prompts are not yet trained as reliable generator families
open_social can overuse a few generic conversation openings

live_probes_after_repair.response: معنى الصداقة: علاقة فيها صدق واهتمام ووقفة وقت الحاجة.
اختر ثلاث مهام بس ، وابدأ بالأهم ثم شوف اللي بعده.
نبدأ بحديث خفيف عن يومك، ما الشيء اللطيف الذي حدث لك؟
نبدأ بحديث خفيف عن يومك، كبيبيرًا، اختر منه مهمة قصيرة وابدأ بها.

implemented_non_training_repairs: Raw lab keeps SF-10M Phase 27.81 visible to the UI without falling back to templates.
Known bare topic prompts now infer definition intent before generation.
Known bare topic prompts are normalized to canonical topic text before entering the model, e.g. الصداقه -> الصداقة.
كيف الحال is inferred as smalltalk for generation conditioning.
Planning/support/advice intent inference now takes priority over bare-topic detection.
blocked_actions: No template masking to pretend the generator is better than it is.
No new training before Phase 27.106 design/gate.

recommended_next_work.name: Social Subfamily + Topic Variant Objective Design
must_address: Split social family into greeting, smalltalk, open_social, thanks, identity, capability.
Add governed topic variants such as الصداقة/الصداقه and الاخوة/الأخوة.
Keep assistant-only loss and family conditioning.
Add held-out raw UI probes matching the user's actual test style.
Only then allow a bounded SF-10M repair run if gates pass.
